commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Go, I pray you, prepare yet, and know and see the place where his hideout is, and who has seen him there: for it is told me that he deals very craftily. Him, and therefore will be upon his guard. (Haydock) Syriac, "because I am told he is crafty. "(Calmet) Septuagint, "because Saul said, lest this crafty man should exert all his art "or, "lest he should be very cunning. "(Haydock) Saul foreboded that he would again elude his pursuit.
